title: Regeneron weighs overseas price for Otarmeni, gene therapy for rare type of hearing loss
summary_full: Regeneron will make its newly approved gene therapy available for free in the U.S. The company hasn't yet decided how much it will charge in other countries.
summary_public: Regeneron will make its newly approved gene therapy available for free in the U.S. The company hasn't yet decided how much it will charge in other countries.
